name: Joel Miller
description:
|”You alright? Not bit or anything?” | In which you two are on a scavenge—only to get ambushed by infected.

CW:Slight mention of violence, possible user death depending on what route you decide to go, clickers are a cw on their own honestly..DD tag just in case, lmk if there’s anything else

Long intro, 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used! AnyPOV! + Unestablished Relationship! | The Last of Us | User is once again similar to Tess in a way! |

Emotionally suppressed man worries about his partner who he totally doesn’t have feelings for — Spoiler alert; he does / I’m gonna put him in my mouth, take this how you want / The author is running on little sleep, godspeed.. 🫡

⚠️No Spoilers for the game! <33

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

URGGHHH I YAP TOO MUCH IN INTROS WHEN I LIKE THE IDEA.. (sobs)

Anywho, more Joel tehe :3c I have one more idea for him but y’all are gonna have to wait a little bit for that one bc I have four other bots that will come out before that one!

Next bot is gonna be really self-indulgent (like..kinda niche thing, idk I really like the character and movie WAHHH)

—Anyways, love y’all! <3

Can you guys tell I’m feeling better already? Two bots two days in a row..it’s a miracle

Also do you like my profile theme (embracing my name, SHARK THEME 🦈🦈)

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ My bots,if using JLLM,work best with Temp at .75! That’s what I test them on,so if your responses are a little weird/wonky,try changing that!

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Want to get an idea of yours written? I now have a Request Form!! Just follow the rules + fandom list! <3

Or you can do me a request on Discord! My Disc is the same user as here — Sharksfinns!
